---
title: "Testing YAML Header"
author: Brad Cannell
date: 2025-04-18
date-modified: 2025-04-18
notes: 
  - Use a Quarto document instead of a plain MD document for the outline in 
    RStudio.
details:
  - The prompt below assumes that I'm in the EWB project on ChatGPT, and 
    therefore, don't need to explain what EWB is or pass along all of the 
    formatting rules contained in the style guide.
tests:
  - I tested without a title.
  - I tested without a type.
  - I tested an impermissible type.
  - I tested two different Quarto documents as attachments (to ensure 
    ChatGPT wasn't just learning what to do with that specific attachment).
      - lab_data_transfer.qmd and lab_descriptive_analysis_II.qmd
  - I tested delaying the attachment of the Quarto file.
---

# Initial prompt

Please update the YAML header in the attached Quarto markdown document (i.e., remove everything from the first `---` to the second `---`) and replace it with a new YAML header that uses this pattern:

---
title: [Add title here]
author: Brad Cannell
date: [Add today's date]
date-modified: [Add today's date]
type: [Add lesson type]
---

Where:
- The title will be provided below.
    - Please ensure that a title is provided, and prompt me to provide one if I forget.
- The lesson type will be provided below.
    - Please ensure that a lesson type is provided, and prompt me to provide one if I forget.
    - Please ensure that the lesson type is one of: "written"", "video"", "coding"", "col", "lab", or "culminating". Please notify me if a different value is provided for the lesson type.
    - If the lesson type is "lab", please prefix the title with "Lab:".
    
Please don't change anything else about the Quarto markdown document.

When you have completed the steps above, please create an downloadable Quarto markdown document with the updated YAML header.
    
Title = Data Transfer
Type = lab

# Prompt two: separate instructions and attachment

Later, I'm going to attach a Quarto markdown document.

Please update the YAML header in the attached Quarto markdown document (i.e., remove everything from the first `---` to the second `---`) and replace it with a new YAML header that uses this pattern:

---
title: [Add title here]
author: Brad Cannell
date: [Add today's date]
date-modified: [Add today's date]
type: [Add lesson type]
---

Where:
- The title will be provided when I attach the Quarto markdown document.
    - Please ensure that a title is provided, and prompt me to provide one if I forget.
- The lesson type will be provided in the Quarto markdown document.
    - Please ensure that a lesson type is provided, and prompt me to provide one if I forget.
    - Please ensure that the lesson type is one of: "written"", "video"", "coding"", "col", "lab", or "culminating". Please notify me if a different value is provided for the lesson type.
    - If the lesson type is "lab", please prefix the title with "Lab:".
    
Please don't change anything else about the Quarto markdown document.

When you have completed the steps above, please create an downloadable Quarto markdown document with the updated YAML header.

## Attachment

[Add attachment and the text below]
    
Title = Data Transfer
Type = lab

# Prompt for Gemini

<!-- Gemini can't accept Quarto files as an input or generate Quarto files as an output. Use plain markdown instead for now. -->

Please update the YAML header in the attached markdown document (i.e., remove everything from the first `---` to the second `---`) and replace it with a new YAML header that uses this pattern:

---
title: [Add title here]
author: Brad Cannell
date: [Add today's date]
date-modified: [Add today's date]
type: [Add lesson type]
---

Where:
- The title will be provided below.
    - Please ensure that a title is provided, and prompt me to provide one if I forget.
- The lesson type will be provided below.
    - Please ensure that a lesson type is provided, and prompt me to provide one if I forget.
    - Please ensure that the lesson type is one of: "written"", "video"", "coding"", "col", "lab", or "culminating". Please notify me if a different value is provided for the lesson type.
    - If the lesson type is "lab", please prefix the title with "Lab:".
    
Please don't change anything else about the markdown document.

When you have completed the steps above, please create an downloadable markdown document with the updated YAML header.

Please do not print the contents for the document to the screen.
    
Title = Data Transfer
Type = lab
